topic: A person playing a game of 'Jenga' and pulling out a middle block.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view of hands hovering over the Jenga tower, selecting the middle block.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up of hands gripping and gently pulling the middle block free.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down view as the block releases, tower briefly wobbles.
parsed_generation.narration: From a front view, the player targets the middle block, then moves to a close-up as the block is pulled free. A top-down view shows the block released and the tower briefly wobbles, completing the 8-second sequence.
